title: [ExportVerilog] Assignment from singed expression to unsigned wires
body:
Currently we emit all wires without explicitly denoting signess (e.g. `wire [8:0] foo = `, not `wire singed [8:0] foo`) so the default behavior (I guess) is unsigned. This is causing assignments between signed and unsigned expressions:
```mlir
  hw.module @Top(%a: i8, %b: i8) -> (c: i1) {
    %0 = comb.shrs bin %a, %b : i8
    %1 = comb.extract %0 from 1 : (i8) -> i1
    hw.output %1 : i1
  }
```
Current output:
```verilog
  wire [7:0] _GEN = $signed($signed(a) >>> b);	// bar.mlir:2:10
  assign c = _GEN[1];	// bar.mlir:2:10, :3:10, :4:5
```


Maybe we need to fix into the following form since we need correct widths too?
```verilog
  singed wire [7:0] _GEN = $signed($signed(a) >>> b);	// bar.mlir:2:10
  assign c = _GEN[1];	// bar.mlir:2:10, :3:10, :4:5
```
